name: Almond Cookie Wreaths
recipeInstructions:
Mix sugar, butter, milk, egg, vanilla, and almond extract. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt. Divide dough into halves. Tint 1/2 with green food coloring. Cover and refrigerate at least 4 hours.
For each wreath, shape 1 teaspoon of dough from each half into a rope about 4 inches long. For smooth, even ropes, roll back and forth on a sugared surface. Place one green and one white rope side by side; press together lightly and twist. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet. Shape each into a circle with ends meeting; press bits of candied cherries onto the wreath for holly berries. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Bake until set and very light brown, 9-12 minutes. About 4 dozen cookies are produced.
